visual: Empty stance with the body folding forward, front hand spearing downward with fingers pointed at the floor as if retrieving a needle.
motion_description: The motion flows continuously, beginning with the right arm extending forward as the hand twists, accompanied by a half-step forward from the left foot. Weight shifts fully back onto the right leg while the torso rotates approximately 90 degrees to the right, drawing the right hand up to ear level and the left hand slightly downward. Transitioning smoothly, the left foot rests lightly on its toes in an empty stance, and the torso folds deeply forward over the front leg. This steady folding action drives the right arm downward, ending with the hand spearing toward the floor with fingers pointing straight down.
